title: Crunchy Malaysian Challot Crumble
description: An earthy and crunchy dish perfect for weeknight meals featuring challots reduced with a jain-friendly crumble topping.

ingredients.name: Juice of 2 limes
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed to maintain flavor intensity.

ingredients.name: 1 cup chopped fresh herbs (such as mint or cilantro)
ingredients.notes: Choose ingredients that suit your taste and preference.

instructions: Slice the challot into thin rounds and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Squeeze the lime juice over the challots, followed by finely mincing the garlic.
Toss the sliced challots in a mix of chopped herbs and jaggery or coconut sugar until well-coated.
For the crumble topping, combine cashews with more herbs and spices like turmeric for color if desired. Mix thoroughly to ensure all ingredients are evenly combined.
Sprinkle the crumble mixture over the coated challots and bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm as a snack or accompaniment to your meal.
